# M.K. Lingeshwarma - Full-Stack Developer & Designer Portfolio

Welcome to the LLM-readable portfolio of M.K. Lingeshwarma (LW19). This document outlines the key pages, links, and structure of this web application to facilitate efficient agent navigation and crawling.

## Core Navigation Map

- **Home Page**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/](https://lingeshwarma.dev/)
  - Main landing view showcasing intro, design specialties, highlights, and custom creative animations.
- **About Me**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/about](https://lingeshwarma.dev/about)
  - Detailed background history, creative philosophy, stats, and personal interests.
- **Projects**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/projects](https://lingeshwarma.dev/projects)
  - Selected work portfolio, web tools, interactive designs, and full-stack implementations.
- **Technical Skills**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/skills](https://lingeshwarma.dev/skills)
  - Tech stack expertise, drag-and-drop interactive physics ballroom dashboard, and database/DevOps proficiencies.
- **Contact & Inquiries**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/contact](https://lingeshwarma.dev/contact)
  - Work inquiries, custom project requests form, and social connectivity networks.
- **Interactive Resume**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/resume](https://lingeshwarma.dev/resume)
  - Full professional experiences grid, timeline details, educational context, and skill benchmarks.
- **Blogs**: [https://lingeshwarma.dev/blogs](https://lingeshwarma.dev/blogs)
  - Digital development logs, engineering journals, and tech walkthroughs.
